name: Mikaëla Escobedo
title: Love it so much
text: Très jolie boutique de bijoux, bien située en vieille ville. Proche de la jolie rue du train. Une belle variété de bijoux en plaqué or et argent.

name: Ka Man Ng
title: Love it so much
text: Amazing local jewellery design. Various type of jewellery with fair price. Friendly location with many hotels and nice restaurant nearby. Next to train street. Highly recommend to have a short visit before move on

name: Amber Laven
title: Love it so much
text: Came across this shop. The lady was so lovely, spoke amazing English. I was able to explain 4-5 different pieces that I wanted. I was able to go into heaps of details as to how I wanted it. highly reccomend if you want silver jewlery custom made

name: Danial Tan
title: Love it so much
text: Excellent service, wide selection of jewellery, no pressure to buy!

name: Daniel Susetyo
title: Love it so much
text: Super cute but intricate silver jewelries designs! Super friendly staff and fair pricing for the craftsmanship. Recommend to take a look around!!!

name: Klaus Von Strauss
title: Love it so much
text: Bought a solid silver ring and bracelet here for a fair price and she adjusted the bracelet for next day collection. Thank you to Viet Jewelers for great products and customer service!
